---
title: "Advanced Inferential Modeling"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

<img style="float: right; margin: 0px 0px 20px 20px" src="../logo/openintro-hex.png" alt="Tutorial illustration" width="250" height="300">


## Lessons

### 1 - [Addressing Nonlinearities](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-07-adv-model-infer-01/)

### 2 - [Cross-Validation](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-07-adv-model-infer-02/)

### 3 - [Inference and Prediction](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-07-adv-model-infer-03/)

### 4 - [Case Study: Logistic Regression for Low Birthweights in Nepal](https://openintro.shinyapps.io/ims-07-adv-model-infer-04/)
